notes: Constitution is a BUILT artifact: prompts/constitution.md (source, edited by this integration) -> `make const` installs it to $(RUN_DIR)/CLAUDE.md and restarts the aitrader systemd service. Never edit the run-dir copy directly; always edit the source and let the owner run `make const` to deploy. ccprospect landed as two new lettered loop steps (not a renumber, to avoid breaking ~25 existing 'step N' cross-references in the doc): STEP 2A (prospective inbox resolution, right after step 2 OPEN NOW) and STEP 5A (forward expectations, right after step 5 PROTECT). Also added: a House-fuses bullet stating existing safety fuses (naked position, liquidation cushion) outrank 2A/5A, a fail-open TOOL_ERROR clause so a ccprospect outage never blocks the trading loop, an explicit step-order sentence enumerating 0,1,2,2A,3,4,5,5A,6,7, and a NONE/NO_CONTRACT sentinel row requirement for 5A so an empty table isn't silently valid. Placement and wording were sanity-checked with ask_gpt given this doc's history (constitution-persona-reverted memory) of being fragile to voice/structure changes. SAME SESSION, a separate but related fix landed STEP 2B (CHECK THE NEWS, right after 2A) restoring a mandatory news-check process step that the 1.36.0 minimal-experiment rewrite had accidentally dropped along with the (correctly-removed) OFFENSE/DEFENSE/PATIENCE posture machinery -- see ccmemory constitution-minimal-experiment for the full history. Order sentence and House-fuses bullet updated to include 2B too. Backups: prompts/constitution.md.backup-20260712 (pre-2A/5A), prompts/constitution.md.backup-20260712-prenews (pre-2B). Deploy (`make const`) is owner-run, not done by this integration.
